Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to translate a complex natural language description of a hospital patient management process into a formal Process Tree structure using specific operators and activity labels

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Initial Sequence Arrival A Registration RG Intake Assessment IA Let us refine A RG IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 2 Triage Sequence After IA Triage Interview TI Triage Classification TC Combined with Step 1 A RG IA TI TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 3 Initial Diagnostic Choice XOR After TC choose between Comprehensive ECG CE or Full Blood Panel FBP Combined with previous structure

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Standard Process Tree Loop semantics are considered and different mappings of the loop are proposed for the abnormal results behavior

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Correction Refinement In many process tree notations the loop means execute A then optionally B then A again so after Initial Test we have a choice tau or the loop

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The most accurate representation of the possibility of skipping the loop is an XOR before the loop because the first specialist treatment cycle only happens if results are abnormal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Loop Body SC then treatment choice TM or SPT then retest choice FCE or FBA Loop part star with body and tau Entry X tau loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 5 Concurrency After normal results activities AI and NC are done in true concurrency

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 6 Final Sequence FAS then DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 7 Final Concurrency BL ICP and MRF occur in true concurrency

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The whole process is recognized as a big sequence of blocks start sequence initial test loop logic parallel care admin sequence final parallel

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If I use X tau loop then the process can skip the loop entirely when initial diagnostic results are normal and can repeat the body multiple times when abnormal

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For the textual representation binary nesting is preferred to stay close to the operator notation while for Python code n ary children are considered because the library supports child lists

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: There is repeated reconsideration about whether operators should be treated as binary or n ary and whether tau should be represented explicitly as tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final review of the flow confirms that all required activities are present all operators are used appropriately and the loop semantics match the narrative
